reviews.review_title: Leave a 1-Star Review, Get Shadow banned
reviews.review_description:
Instead of handling constructive criticism professionally, you chose to engage in highly unethical retaliation. After my initial 1-star review, you applied a targeted, server-side restriction to my account.
​Now, I hear exactly 0.5 seconds of audio before it completely cuts out, leaving me unable to hear anyone after that. While I can still create a room, absolutely no one can join it, and I am entirely blocked from joining anyone else's room.
​This deliberate isolation is a pathetic and immature way to punish a user for honest feedback. Attempting to disguise this as a bug is an insult to your users' intelligence. I have already escalated this abuse of power to Meta Support and requested a full reimbursement.


---Reply to the Developer
Really? "Baseless claims"? It's hilarious how quickly you lifted the shadowban right after I filed a formal complaint. Don't worry, I have proof of everything. My review stays here as a lesson to you and a warning to others about your pathetic retaliation against 1-star ratings.

developer_response.body: Waleed, we don't even have a way to do "targeted server-side restriction" as you claim. You were never given a timeout or ban. It sounds like you are having connection issues. Please reach out to us on our discord or website (wooorld.io) so we can help resolve your issue instead of making baseless claims.

reviews.review_description:
Its basically VR google maps. Its great to explore the world from your living room. You get to see the geology of mountains and erosion patterns or walk through a desert, a mountain side or a neighbourhood. Its great for getting a feel for a place.
It would just be nice if you could travel a bit faster in the immersive view, like you can with the pinch to zoom method on desktop view. 
Maybe if there was a way to have links to VR youtube video tours as well.
when i get on, my game lags so badly, that i cant even turn my headset off

Endless fun to be had here resulting in some very late nights whether it is competing or just exploring.  Wooorld has helped me escape through a tough time in my life.  I have met so many fun and caring people notable folk for me are Kazsmart, Samuelf and Zurjosh who are always ready to help with any aspect of the wooorld app.  I think this app does far more than possibly the developers even realize bringing people and unlikely friendships together.  Excellent job.

The 3D quality in flight mode leaves much to be desired; I'd like to see improvements in future versions. I do like the co-op mode and Street View mode, though; they're good. I'd also like to be able to add notes within the app to find streets I've noted. Regarding the size, it makes us look gigantic; the proportions aren't right. For now, I'm giving it a 3.5, with the intention of raising the score if they improve it.

developer_response.body:
Hi kazerolo, thank you for the feedback. Regarding the size, you can select a different scale from the bottom left corner of the Minimap. Tap X on your left controller, then click on one of the other options. If you are already dissatisfied with the quality of the 3d imagery though, you will find that 1:1 actual size is much worse. We would also love to see improvements here in the future, but currently this is the best available in any app using Google's 3d imagery. If you'd kindly consider revising your rating with this in mind, judging Wooorld on the features that we do have control over, a higher rating is a small gesture that can help us improve the app.

To add notes, one way to do this is to save a place and add it to a new List. You can make the list Private, so only you can see its contents. If there's something else you had in mind for note taking, please reach out to the team on Discord or by using the contact form, both available at wooorld.io.

reviews.review_description:
"edit* after dev response....that's the point, I didn't need to go to discord to  find out how to see points/pics before. Ex..I went to Cabo San Lucas and searched there in places...1 or 2 came up..(what a joke!)...on the mini map you need to constantly click on the map to see if there are any 360 nearby.. seriously?!. No pins showed up in the map when you're above the city, buildings in 3d. Before there were pins all over you could see, click...or you could shake the pin...now you have to go to mini map, constantly click and click and hope you get lucky. Oh you can see 360 pics ..but you'll be clicking the entire time trying to get lucky. 



I went back to this app after not being in it in awhile. Now the interface is different (more difficult). 
What is worse is that there aren't nearly as many pins (pics) available that other ppl have added! Like 90%+ less. Also, there used to be, in some areas/places, where you could go to street level and click on multiple waypoints to be like walking along the street or beach or park, etc. now there are none I could find. I could walk along Myrtle Beach, tombstone, AZ, Gatlinburg...now nothing. I went to other places I have went before (really popular places) and pins and pics were all gone now. This app is nearly useless now. Tell me what's up devs! 
Will change rating if they go back to how it was.

developer_response.body:
Post-edit developer response: Hi tommycd1, I think you are confusing pins (saved places) with available 360 images. On the Minimap, you can toggle the street view layer to see blue lines and dots for all available 360s. The 360 toggle is on the bottom right corner of the Minimap. There are hundreds of billions of them and you can see where they are. You don't have to keep clicking and "hope you get lucky" 

----- The pins you are seeing are different, those places saved by other users. You can toggle the visibility of pins using the toggle at the top right corner of the Minimap.

----- If you need help, we would be happy to support. As we mentioned before, simply join our discord or reach out to us via our website wooorld.io

reviews.review_description: I love this app. The ability to do a ‘fly by’ to all kinds of locations virtually is amazing. Cant wait to purchase this one!

This app is absolutely amazing! I travel all over the world with my son and I live in the USA. My son lives in Canada. We get on in the evening and we glide all over the world we go to street view walk down the street, go back to 3-D view. It’s an absolutely amazing experience.
You buy the app only to discover that to use most of its functionality you have to pay extra. It's a slower, clumsier version of Google Earth, I regret purchasing it.
I purchased it hoping be able to see real world views of different places arout the world, but the interface is difficult. I will stay with real views of Google Maps.

reviews.review_title: Hey banned for 5months because of review
reviews.review_description:
Hey what going on here I haven't been on for over 4 months and when I tried to log on you today you say I've been band for 6 months....really....bad behaviour and harassment....I'm 70ys old and haven't harrassed any body...what kind of crap stunt is this....I want a refund and can stick it....anyone else been banned for fake charges??? Get your data correct and stop hiding behind this wall....check yourself I have not been on here for months guys....
This is insanity.....very disappointing that your security is so flawed


THE ONLY THING I AN PUT IT DOWN TO IS THAT I PUT IN AN HONEST BAD REVIEW AND THAT'S ABOUT SAME TIME I GOT BANNED....BE CAREFUL GUYS ONLY PUT IN GOOD REVIEWS OR THEY WILL BAN YOU NEXT LIKE ME.


WHERES MY REFUND GUYS YOU CAN STICK THIS DODGY APP

developer_response.body: This is false! This user accessed the app during the free period and was banned due to multiple harassment reports from other users. --- We do not suspend anyone based on a review.

reviews.review_description:
I wanted to play with my friends in this game and then they said they couldn’t because it was 10 freaking dollars make this game free again. I’m at the verge of deleting this trash game so for the developers make it free again. sincerely ST0NE C0LD.
￼
￼

developer_response.body: Apologies for the frustration, but do you really think it's fair to give such a poor rating for something because you think it should be free? If it's trash, then why do you want to play with your friends? Ratings like this, which have nothing to do with the quality of the experience, are exactly why we could not continue offering it for free. A sandwich costs about $10, you eat it and then it's gone. Wooorld offers an experience, a place where you can learn about local and far away places, meet people from those places, make friends and return to it every day with no additional cost.  I kindly ask that you take a moment to reflect and perhaps reconsider this review. Sincerely, Paul

reviews.review_description: Lots of complaints about having to pay for the geoguesser game, but we play it weekly. It's some of the most fun we've had in VR for years. Only one person in your crew needs to pay for it to allow everyone to use in a private lobby also. I'll gladly support devs who make a great experience. If you're looking for other free games, check out Gtag 😂🤦‍♂️
Stick to Google maps. I have no idea what this application does better

It's a fun app just not user friendly and can be overwhelming not to mention it constantly freezes or doesn't load properly once you get it going certain options don't work so you have restart the app.

Really great! 
Would just add a measuring tool :)
Totally recommend
Loved the new update 3d makes the app next level
This application really amazed me, but I really hope they add a Traditional Chinese interface (Taiwanese)

reviews.review_title: Great place to see the wooorld
reviews.review_description:
I have been on wooorld for over a year now. Great friends to be made as well as always adventures seeing the wooorld. Would like it to be mobile app as well for times away from my VR.

Jimmyjimmycaliman

reviews.review_title: It MAY take someone to help
reviews.review_description: I met a few ppl tonight who taught me how to play the game!! I'm happy with it now, NOW that I know how to travel😊

It’s Google Maps.. If you buy it they won’t let you play the geo guesser rip off game without paying them more. None of this is original or creative work by the devs yet they milk you for more money even after purchase.
When I playing on the game my vr will not turn on

I just purchased this app today and was trying to get acclimated... it took a little bit, but when I joined my first group, it was worth it. The hosts were nice and welcoming.  Polite and friendly.  An excellent social application.
Love it
Also useless social bs

For me this is by far the best App on the Oculus. It is very sociable and educational at the same time and as a group we come on here to play this and have so much fun. 
The developers listen to and respond to requests also which is great for the continued improvement of the game. 
Love it keep up the great work ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

developer_response.body: Hey Shiver.Me.Timbers—thanks for the Out of this Wooorld review! We’re thrilled to hear that Wooorld has become a fun and social space for you and your group, and that you’re also enjoying the educational side of the experience. We truly value your feedback and are always listening to what our users have to say. Glad to have you on board!

reviews.review_title: Bought game, but can't play with friends
reviews.review_description: Friend purchased the game, but can't join my private game without buying an add-on. Paying customers are limited to how many games they can play.

developer_response.body: This is incorrect.  Here's how it works ------1- Anyone can join a private world using a system invite or an invite code, regardless of add-on ownership. ------2- Players without Player+ get 1 free game per day, plus 5 extra free games if at least one person in the group owns Player+. So in this case, each friend would get 6 free games per day. ------3- If the game creator owns Player+ all other users -regardless of their add-on ownership- get to play all game modes and maps, including the premium ones. -------- We have recently responded to a similar review by you that had the same false information and asked you to reach out to us if you need help. If you need support please visit: wooorld.io

reviews.review_description:
Lots of promise but little performance. 

I was looking forward to an ‘emotional’ experience of walking down a certain street in my hometown.  Not even close. This release claims a Google Earth ‘update’ but the street view experience is like old, bad video game sprites.

developer_response.body: Hi there. Unfortunately what you're describing is incorrect. --- Perhaps you don't know how to load street view images yet. Sounds like you tried to explore in the 3D map (which is the same 3D data that can be found in Google Earth) at 1:1 scale instead of loading 360 images. Wooorld also includes over 220 Billion 360 degree street view images from around the world, some of which are showcased in the lobby. Each one at stunning 8K (or higher) quality. There are several ways to load 360 images, the easiest is to click anywhere on the Minimap and then click Load 360. You can then use the 360 spots to jump to other connected 360 images. --- If you need help with this or anything else, simply reach out to us on our website (wooorld.io) or discord (wooorld.io/discord) and we would be happy to give you a tour.

reviews.review_description: Good

It's a very good game I like exploring and playing with my friends but why everything is paid ? You should let us pay once for the assistant not a subscription for a tool like that, and pay once for the whole game instead of buying it then also buying the game mode, and the advanced explorer mode, you know that Meta store doesn't use region stores so in my case and other people's case it's expensive, and I hope you'll find a solution to low memory problem cause it's really annoying

Google Earth VR is by far one of my most favorite VR apps out there. However, it is only on PC. So, if you only have the Meta Quest or are not near your PC when you want to share this, you didn't used to have a lot of options. However, now you do, and there are a couple of them that are all trying to do the same thing. Having used Fly, Earthquest and Wooorld, I find they all have about the same quality of Google maps, very similar to the PC version, and have StreetView access. However, they all have their own slight difference. Of the three though, I find Wooorld had the smoothest transitions between locations, had highlighted notes on locations that others did not and had all of the user posted StreetView images I was looking for. Plus, to top it all off, you can do it with a friend and jump into a Geo Guesser style game for some fun of it. I originally got this game while it was free and still need to get the Explorer+ package, as the majority of all the other features are behind that slight paywall. However, it is all of those extra features, the multiplayer, and the game mode that make it better than Google Earth VR.

This really feels like the definitive exploration app - access to the entire world, a Geoguesr-esk game mode and welcoming community. Whether you want to go in solo, with friends or open to meeting new people it feels like there's something to scratch every itch - social hangout spot, fun games, educational however you see fit.

reviews.review_title: A confusing and frustrating UX downgrade
reviews.review_description:
Unfortunately, in my opinion, the UX has worsened significantly. All the side panels that open have a UI that feels too much like a mobile app, without considering that in VR, it's less manageable.

The fonts are small and do not take accessibility into account, which in 2025 should be a priority for any software. The UI is generally too confusing.

The 3D map keeps moving and does not anchor to the space, so you constantly have to reposition it. The same issue applies to the mini-map, which shifts every time it's opened, often overlapping the 3D map. This makes it difficult to interact with movement controls as they get stuck together. Overall, everything feels too chaotic and imprecise, making the experience frustrating even for just a few minutes. A more structured use is unthinkable.

With the 3D map, you can no longer get a global view of the world, as the zoom-out function has been limited. You are therefore forced to use the mini-map and the point cursor is too small and often invisible especially on light colors.

When entering a 360 photo, the only way to exit is through the mini-map, which may have been closed to free up the view.

In conclusion, it’s too cumbersome, and to think that the first versions were not like this. It would have been better to have fewer features and fewer semi-useless pop-up windows, but with a more immediate and user-friendly experience.

developer_response.body: Hi, thanks for the feedback. A few corrections that we hope will be helpful: 1) Font size: You can resize the entire menu to make content larger by dragging the white handle at the top right corner. 2) You can easily exit a 360 by pointing directly up and pressing the trigger.

reviews.review_title: Used to be good, but now it's awful
reviews.review_description: For a paid app its an awful app, which offers poor functionalities without subscription. The app used to be intuitive, but nowadays I always have to search for the right controls and buttons.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. ----- We'd like to clarify that the only subscription we offer is for the new, optional conversational AI Assistant, and even that has a one-time purchase alternative for users who prefer not to subscribe. ----- Additionally, existing free-tier users **like you** continue to enjoy unlimited 3D Exploration, unlimited 360 browsing (220 Billion immersive 360 images from around the world), daily free games and more. Unfortunately, due to misuse, the free tier is no longer available to new users. ----- We understand that the 2.0 update can take some getting used to. These updates directly address user requests and include significant improvements such as a fully immersive 3D map, access to the entire Google Earth catalog with over 2,500 detailed 3D cities, enhanced social interactions, and hundreds of other improvements. ----- We're here if you have further questions or need assistance navigating these updates!

reviews.review_description: You have to $$$$$ FOR EVERYTHING!!¡!!!

developer_response.body: No, you don’t! ----- buying Wooorld gives you unlimited 3D map exploration across 2,500+ detailed 3D cities, unlimited access to over 220 billion 360° images from around the globe. You can explore public, private, and solo worlds; create and edit AI tours; save and organize unlimited places; and use powerful tools like the sketch, guide mode, Magnifier, 360 Timeline, 360 History, Tabletop Mode, Immersive Mode, and more. ----- On top of that, you still get all the free Game World perks, including daily free games without paying an extra dime!

reviews.review_description: So pleased i bought this game carnt waight to play omg ppl have ranted at me to get now i have woop woop cheap aswell

reviews.review_title: it looks nice at first glance
reviews.review_description: I really love the presentation of the map on this table. But, it lacks 3d Models in so many areas, which are present in  google Earth VR. Wouldn´t by it. Get Google Earth VR. Update 2025: they got Google Data now, but the load times are horrible. It takes quite a long time until graphics are nice, then you turn your head, same game, reload starts ....  I still don´t like it, still crap.

I've been using an Oculus for 6 years,  and this is the best app I've used,  hands down. I've never done another app review. 
It's not an action app or for kids that want to shoot stuff.
It is, however,  a thinking app that will get you addicted immediately. If you love to travel, love puzzles, curious about the world,  interested in geography, or just want to see the world from your couch,  this game is for you. (I almost didn't call it a game,  but an adventure)

The experience is amazing, the 360° photos make me feel like I'm really in the places I visit and the 3D map from Google Earth is fun to use. The quality of all the content in Wooorld is the same as Google Maps and Earth. Thanks to this app I've seen amazing places all over the world that I will never visit in real life but now I have all these memories that I was there.

I've tried them all, and Wooorld is by far the best. A steeper learning curve with so many options, but the results are fantastic. Hours evaporate like minutes. I can't recommend this program highly enough. Well done developers 👏👏

reviews.review_title: Couldn't have asked for a better app.
reviews.review_description:
Great UI, high quality streets, great variety of things to do.... It's clear a lot of effort is being put into this. Thank you.

Also, don't let the lack of developer posts in over a year deter you, as they're still putting out major updates to the game, and it's such a cohesive and fun experience. The 2.0 update brings it to a whole new level.
Only basics

developer_response.body: Hi, we would love to know what you meant by "only basics", so we can improve. ----- While we wait, here are just a few of Wooorld's features that we think go beyond only basics: 2,500+ 3D cities, 220 Billion+ 360 images, Fully immersive mode, Table-top mode, Unlimited Saved Places and Lists, AI Tours about any topic with voice narration, images, wiki articles, Where in the Wooorld (location guessing games), Treasure Hunt mini-games, Fully conversational AI Assistant that can answer your questions in any language, Mixed Reality support, Eye/Face/Hand Tracking, Voice typing, and dozens of other features...

reviews.review_title: New update makes app unusable - Jan 2025
reviews.review_description:
App has always run pretty smoothly, however, the latest update seems to have made it way too buggy to be used.

Constant flicker in the left eye when you move your head even the smallest amount, half the cities I tried to check out just had massive holes in the map that wouldn't load, this was both in tabletop and immersive maps.

I understand you're trying to do something that pushes the limits of what mobile hardware is capable of, but, I'm not able to use the app currently due to these issues.

Update 1 month later, still having the same issues, constant flicker at the edge, starts to give me a headache/migraine after 5 mins, seems to happen once you change location from wherever the app starts you off

developer_response.body: Hi Ames_1, we've just released a new update which has performance improvements as well as fixing the holes in the map. Please give it a try and let us know if it is improved.

reviews.review_description: Wooorld is a fantastic app that makes virtual travel an incredibly fun and relaxing experience. I often find myself spending hours exploring different places and enjoying the journey with friends. However, the search function for points of interest isn’t always accurate, which can be frustrating at times. Given this, I believe the AI features should be available for free or affordable lifetime prices rather than requiring a subscription. Overall, it’s a great app with a lot of potential!

I like this app at first, but then they started to have all the different up charges and it just turned me off. Like dang I just got the headset less than a year ago and I paid for more games and upcharges ￼ than I paid for this headset and they could at least add in a video recording feature with all these up charges. 

I find Earth Quest and Wonder to be more superior and they are not begging for money and ￼ subscription, they are literally approving the application every few month￼￼￼s.

reviews.review_title: 'explore' a city? i don't think so
reviews.review_description: The 3D maps make me feel like I've time traveled back to 2003 to see an early demo of google earth. (google earth was keyhole back then, i think). if you want to see how a place is laid out, this might be a helpful tool. but it's not worth paying for. no informational overlays, just big minecraft-resolution versions of large structures. if you advertise an app with phrases like 'breathtaking detail' and 'google maps integration', then the experience should be comparable (at least) to the detail we see in google maps, or in street view. Honestly, Google made a demo for Google Cardboard a million years ago that seemed to me to be better.

developer_response.body: We aren't even sure what you are talking about. Wooorld includes the same exact 3D data as Google Earth, the same map data in our Minimap as Google Maps, and the same 360 images as Google Street View.

reviews.review_description: This has  everything, including places that others can't get on an actual picture, also has an exlopedia only this app that has it

I was a beta tester for this app back in the day, and even then, I found it far too broken. Recently, I purchased it in a sale because it has been receiving five-star reviews lately. Honestly, I can’t understand these 5-star ratings. 

While the app does function better and is more stable than before, it’s still riddled with broken features. For instance, during a private expedition with three people, parts of the map would randomly disappear, and in the guessing game, the map would sometimes place the guess pin in a completely different spot than intended. On one occasion, one of our players was no longer able to mark their guess on the map, even though they could still zoom and move it around.

Additionally, the app's user interface is far from intuitive. It feels like it was designed on a PC and barely tested in VR. There are more menus than I could count and simple, obvious things like adjusting audio are hidden in odd places (oh, you wanted to find it in the settings? Haha, silly you!). The app desperately needs heavy simplification and streamlining. As it stands, I don’t think it’s particularly easy to learn, especially for the older generation.

Edit: I also remembered that a thing that bothered us when playing the guessing game was that we could not play against each other. Now, it's only a co-op, or red vs blue, so if you're a party of three, it won't be much fun.

developer_response.body: Hi there, thanks for the feedback. The missing 3D tiles issue has now been fixed. It was due to increased concurrent usage of the app that led to rate limiting by Google. We will take into consideration your other points as we do with all feedback and keep improving Wooorld as we have been.

reviews.review_description: This app was just fine, then they decided to update it and now it is horrible! Not user friendly, slower responsiveness, and just worse in every single way! There is not one thing better about the app with the update! Please switch it back!!!

reviews.review_title: To many in app purchases, dollhouse view
reviews.review_description: App is 9.99 has to many in app purchases costs 10.00 each, scaling off dollhouse scenes I.e 20 foot house looks 2 feet tall, would not recommend, very confusing ,fly app is much better.

developer_response.body: You are using the app for free and complaining about it costing money, while spreading false information. Users can change their scale all the way down to human scale whenever they want.

reviews.review_description: I had problems with teleport but in fact it works with A then trigger (instead of trigger then A)

I really want to love this app. Right now, I like it. The 3D Maps are amazing, but they are ooold. At least 5 years old by my estimation.  I live in downtown Ft. Lauderdale. My apt building was completed in 2020. I moved in, in 2021. Wooorld still has my building as the vacant lot that it used to be. 4 new buildings have gone up around me. 2 are almost complete, yet they still don't exist on Wooorld's map. In 2019, the Hard Rock Hotel and casino built a 400 ft tall guitar shaped hotel complete with its own beach, but Wooorld still renders the hotel as it looked in 2018. Las Vegas has erected The Spehere but it's also non-existent in Wooorld. These are places I'm familiar with, and I know what they should look like. I'm using Woorld to explore other countries and cities, but I'm sure I'm not getting an accurate representation of those places. I just paid $9.99 for the Game+ expansion thinking maybe that would give updated maps...Nope and since I didn't read the disclaimer I can't get a refund (sucks for me, but that's my fault). I really hope the developers haven't abandoned this app. Flye and Earthquest have updated their maps and they are now my go to for virtual traveling.  The 3D Maps on Wooorld really make me feel like Tony Stark  manipulating his Maps in IronMan 3. I know that was nerdy. Please Please PLEEEZE give us new Maps to make this app as amazing as it should be.


*Edit*
Wooorld is back on top!! The update with the new maps and features have put this back in my top 3 favorite games and is now responsible for me spending way too many hours in VR. Shout out to the developer for the improvements.

developer_response.body: Thank you for updating your review! And we're glad you are enjoying the new update! --- Anyone else reading this review: make sure to read the edit at the bottom! :)

reviews.review_description: This app is the best of its kind. Is there an option or plans to toggle on a human scale version? Currently I just feel like a giant, but I'd love to be able to navigate through the world and see things from an average sized human's POV (and I do NOT mean street view).

developer_response.body: You can already change your scale whenever you want, including human scale (1:1)! Simply tap any of the scale buttons at the bottom left corner of the Minimap! :)

reviews.review_description: Was expecting a bit better than this. Quality is OK when your high up but forget getting close.looks so junky upclose or at Street level. Uninstalled after 10.minutes sorry but.
This VR Experience is just amazing.

reviews.review_title: Beats google earth vr  hands down
reviews.review_description: Very entertaining and immersive
This is exactly what I wanted to do with Virtual reality, I can't wait for future versions. Three thumbs up 👍👍👍
Unless after you have bought this app, you use more money for the whole experience. This is not great.

reviews.review_title: "Low memory, there is not enough memory"
reviews.review_description: Yesterday it worked just fine. Playing on quest 3 with more then enough memory
Never get this app, it’s stupid and has repetitive limited places you can explore, and all you do is look at 3d images.

developer_response.body: None of that is true. Wooorld now includes over 2,500 3D cities. Ignore this troll!

reviews.review_description: My most used vr app. So many of these negative reviews are unfair criticisms written by the most stubborn people on the planet. If you take the time to learn how to use it, it’s amazing.

The new update completely spoilt this once great tool I used to use this to get an idea of areas and hotels for holidays the daft glide tool and the no longer being able to drag the ‘pin’ is not good also searching for places is now diabolical it either doesn’t bring stuff up or you have to type nearly the full address to find stuff completely ruined it

developer_response.body: Hey there! --- Search in the Explore tool hasn't changed. You can keep using that to get identical results as before. As for dragging the pin, try enabling 360 spots on the new minimap and clicking anywhere to load 360s for an even better experience. --- Alternatively, Laser Point anywhere (hold A) on the 3D map and hold the trigger for a second to bring up an action panel that includes "Load 360". We genuinely believe the experience is better than ever. Just might take a little getting used to, as with any change. --- Please consider joining our discord and we will be happy to address all of your concerns. wooorld.io/discord.

reviews.review_description: Q3 headset told my memory isn't good enough everything looks molten disappointing
Please support Chinese

reviews.review_title: solo worlds not available in free plan
reviews.review_description:
I don't like being forced to meet other people when using the app. Not using this app for meeting people but for exploring the world. Unfortunately, you cannot do that with the free tier unless blocking everyone you meet..

Also really annoying when multiple people are manipulating the map.
Just a question. Does it have any limit at the 360 photos I can save as places?

developer_response.body: Hi there! The Explorer+ add-on unlocks unlimited saved spaces.

reviews.review_description: It’s like a ripoff of google earth but there is a lot of kids under the age of 13! I can’t even make a server where it’s just me. Can’t the private thingy be for free because those kids are annoying as heck >:I
I'm looking for a Google Earth experience. Wooorlds seems to offer something similar. But instead, it has extremely low resolution, up to the extent that one can't use it. It's horrible.

developer_response.body: Hi there. That definitely doesn't sound right unless your system has been modified with a 3rd party tool to change the render scale. Please reach out to us at wooorld.io or by joining our discord so our team can troubleshoot your issue: https://bit.ly/discooord

reviews.review_description:
I paid for this app a few months ago and now it’s free. What’s with that?? Now I can’t even play alone, as that option doesn’t exist with my now ‘free’ version of the app that I paid good money for. This was terribly managed and looks like a money grab. Please tell me how I can get a refund for this FREE app that I paid for.

In response to the 2nd message from the developer received today, February 1st: 

I did respond to your email — immediately after receiving it two days ago. You sent me 6 emails, five of them the exact same! Please sort this out, whatever issues you are having with your communications. Thank you.

PS. Please do not say that my issue was ‘not caused by you’. I paid for an app several months ago that was unusable when I tried to play it for the first time a few days ago. I have no idea when or where you ‘informed’ owners of your changes. ALL paying customers should have been automatically converted to your new system, regardless of when they first used /use the app. At the very least, customers who paid for the app should have been directly and personally notified of the changes you were making.

Update: April 13th, 2024

Still crickets from this developer. They have not replied to any of my emails or to my message here. I waited several months for them to make this right, but as they have not even bothered to respond to me, I am flagging and reporting them for their unscrupulous business practices. Hopefully something will be done to protect others who have experienced the same thing I have. If you’re on the fence about this app, I strongly suggest you stick with the free version, as this developer cannot be trusted. Save your money. It’s low ratings are deserved.

April 14th Update

Amazing how quickly this developer responded when they discovered they had been flagged and reported. Further evidence of their shadiness is that they deleted their original response to my first message, in which they asked me to email
them, which I did, several times. I hope this clarifies things for anyone still curious about this app. Save your money.

developer_response.body: The Founder Editions of both Explorer+ and Player+ were activated for your account in February. ------ The reason you did not automatically receive the Founder Edition add-ons earlier is because you had not logged into Wooorld *before* we introduced a free tier. This is due to a limitation of the Quest Store system, which only notifies us of a user owning our app at their first login, not at the point of purchase. ------ We are disappointed by the continued baseless accusations, despite our repeated, good faith efforts to explain the situation and address the issue. ------ Regarding your refund request, please note that developers do not have access to transactional processes such as purchases or refunds; these are exclusively handled by the Quest Store. ------  We also don't get notified when someone reports or flags our app, so your accusation regarding the timing of our response is false.

reviews.review_title: Costs $ to not let rando creeps in
reviews.review_description: Any game that wants me to pay money to disallow any random creep from intruding in on my game deserved negative 5 stars. I would say throw it in the trash but then I would feel sorry for the rest of the trash.

developer_response.body: Goodbye, RabidHobo 👋. Nice username.

reviews.review_description: I bought it for my daughter and a random stranger comes up to her and starts swearing and calling her rude for no reason. Other people we there and it didn't give a chance to become invisible . It gives you no directions whatsoever and If anyone has had this problem, then there should give a refund . I am appaled by this app .There are racist and just generally creepy strangers who 'try to be friendly and speak to you'.DO NOT BUY ESPECIALLY FOR SOMEONE UNDER 13

developer_response.body:
Wooorld provides several social safety features:
--1) **User Blocking**: Blocked users get kicked out of your worlds and become invisible in other people's worlds.
--2) **User Reporting 1**: You can report users directly within the app.
--3) **User Reporting 2**: Wooorld integrates with Quest System's user reporting features.
--4) **User Suspension and Ban**: While we cannot control the behavior of each user, we immediately suspend or ban users who are reported for violations.
--5) **Mute and Hide Users**: Wooorld offers ways to mute or hide other users.
--6) **Solo and Private Worlds**: Users can create Solo and Private worlds if they don't want to interact with users in Public worlds.
--7) **Invisible Lobby**: Wooorld begins with a tutorial, placing them initially in 'INVISIBLE' mode in the lobby and explains the difference between Visible and Invisible modes and provides instructions on how to switch.
--8) **Opt-in only Visible Mode**: Switching to Visible mode is an opt-in action and only the user can change it.
----- While we take many social safety measures as explained above, we strongly advise against allowing children under 13 to access public social VR spaces, unsupervised, in ANY app on the Quest platform. Your feedback is valuable to us, and we continually work to improve the Wooorld experience for all users.

reviews.review_description: Downloaded twice and still in main screen which shows me Network error. Don’t waste energy to download

developer_response.body:
This issue has been resolved with our latest update. 

A small number of our users were unable to connect to our servers because their network was blocking the connection. We've now introduced extra ports to bypass this problem.

reviews.review_description:
I bought this app expecting a Google Earth like experience, but little did I know this app only support Bing 3D buildings, not Google's, and there are are just very few 3D models in Bing, which is a complete disappointment. 
So this app is useless to me unless one day Google 3D models is supported or Bing maps has as many 3D models as Google Earth.

You are missing Chihana Hot Springs within Alaska, Wolf Haven National Wildlife Park in Washington, Onsen Hot Springs within Japan and Chinese Gardens in Portland. Facepalms.
I have also tried Voice Search and it still does not list these places! Only Arizona along with the wrong locations!

developer_response.body:
Hi there! The old search is now replaced with the much improved 'Explore' tool which not only returns much more accurate results, it can also show you nearby places and even Wikipedia articles.

We hope you'll consider adjusting your review!

reviews.review_description: Much too complicated and difficult to navigate.  Great concept but LOTS of work needed.

Im just assuming that the power of the quest doesnt let this app have the potential it could due to the power of it.

At first it seemed cool but as soon as you zoom in (and i dont mean down to like street level) its just mostly a pixely blurred mess.

After the tutorial i tried opening the search button to search where i live but for some reason all the buttons were faded and i just couldn't figure it out.

Maybe i missed something in the tutorial but at this point i just gave up and have requested a refund.

If it was free maybe it would be fun for a little bit with other people but at the price it is i just dont recomend it.

reviews.review_title: LOTS OF ISSUES WITH THE APP
reviews.review_description:
Preview looked fantastic, 
But sadly it's not,
Lot of issues with the app,
Structure of the app complicated,
needs to be simpler,
Design of the app is good,
but needs lots and lots of improvement,
Awkward to manoeuvre around,
I wanted to be private, 
but people kept coming through, 
So Unhappy with privacy,
I tried to request a refund,
As not happy with this app at all, 
But was refused refund,
I much prefer wander, far superior.

REPLY TO RESPONSE:
I requested everything to be private, but people kept coming through, as pop ups, so I would then go back to the beginning, 
to find my settings had been changed, this happened every time whilst using the app, so this must be a glitch, 
And yes I do understand it's not down to yourselves to refund,
but I'm still not happy they refused.

developer_response.body: Hi, the private mode works as described in the app. When you're in private mode, others cannot see your avatar or hear you in the lobby and if you create a Solo or Private World, only the people you invite can join you. The refund process is handled entirely by the store. Developers don't get to see, approve or deny refund requests.
